overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The journey begins on a sunny urban sidewalk with the iconic Arasaka Tower visible in the distance, transitions through a street crossing, and ends in an industrial waterfront area with large pipes and canals.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street traffic and palm trees

events.description: character passes a pedestrian in a white jacket walking in the opposite direction
green truck and other vehicles pass by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and shorts walking toward camera then passing by
green truck driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical megastructure with multiple illuminated rings, dominating the skyline
green industrial building with American flag decal and corrugated metal facade
sleek dark building with illuminated trim and raised planters
tall pole with horizontal orange light fixture extending over the sidewalk
tall palm tree on the sidewalk near the green building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny urban sidewalk in Night City. The camera follows the character walking past modern architecture with the massive Arasaka Tower visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction and vehicles pass by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: exits the covered sidewalk area and enters the open intersection crosswalk
pedestrians begin crossing the street as traffic stops at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crosswalk area, moving with the flow of pedestrians toward the tower

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and camouflage pants crossing the street
black car stopped at the traffic light waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: curved elevated highway structure connecting to the tower district with support pillars
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt street
traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk into a wide urban intersection. The Arasaka Tower looms larger as the camera approaches, and an elevated highway ramp becomes visible. Pedestrians cross the street in groups while vehicles wait at the traffic signal.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with concrete seating and large planters

events.description: enters the industrial plaza area with benches and large concrete planters
turns slightly left to navigate around the large concrete planter structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial plaza, passing people sitting on benches and approaching the waterfront

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on concrete benches in the plaza area
person in white shirt and red cap walking past the benches

entered.detail: tall industrial building with red structural beams and large 05 marking on facade
large rectangular concrete planter with tall grasses and graffiti on the side
concrete seating area with several people resting and conversing
large rusty industrial pipes running along the waterfront edge
industrial canal with greenish water visible between structures

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an industrial plaza with large concrete planters and benches where people are sitting. The industrial building marked with 05 dominates the left side, while large pipes and a canal become visible on the right. The character navigates around the planter structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway with large pipes and canal

events.description: moves into narrow industrial walkway alongside the canal with prominent piping
slight turn to the right following the curve of the pipe walkway along the water

agents.ego_description: exploring the industrial waterfront area, walking alongside large pipes and observing the industrial architecture

entered.detail: large valve wheel and pipe junction structure with yellow railings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow industrial waterfront walkway. Large rusty pipes dominate the foreground running parallel to the canal. The industrial building 05 recedes into the distance while the Arasaka Tower remains visible ahead. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating an isolated industrial atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, sunny urban center into a desolate industrial waterfront. It begins on a crowded sidewalk where the character walks past modern architecture with the massive Arasaka Tower looming in the distance. As the character moves into a wide urban intersection, the tower grows larger and an elevated highway ramp emerges amidst the flow of pedestrians and waiting vehicles. The scene then shifts into an industrial plaza, navigating around concrete planters and benches as the environment transitions toward a large building marked 05 and an adjacent canal. Finally, the camera moves through a narrow walkway dominated by large rusty pipes, leaving the crowds behind for an isolated atmosphere while the Arasaka Tower remains visible on the horizon.
